relations.evidence: `Nuvei <https://www.nuvei.com>`_ is a Canadian-based payment solution provider...
Create a Nuvei account, if necessary, via our referral page
Utilize the Sandbox Dashboard to test the integration
switch to the Production Dashboard to accept payments
Go to Settings in the left sidebar, select My Integration Settings
select your payment page in the Website dropdown menu
Copy the Merchant ID and Site ID values
Copy the Merchant ID and Site ID values
Click Reveal, then copy the Secret Key
Enable User Trap to redirect users back to the payment page
Decline Recovery to display a popup suggesting alternative or similar payment methods
payment provider Nuvei
fill in the Merchant Identifier
fill in the Site Identifier
fill in the Secret Key
change its state to Enabled
change its state to Test Mode
information saved at the step payment_providers/nuvei/dashboard
payment_providers/add_new
test using the test mode <payment_providers/test-mode>
payment_providers/nuvei/services
